lessons.title: Linearer Verlauf
lessons.description:
Gradients create smooth transitions between colors. The linear-gradient() function creates a gradient along a straight line.

Basic syntax:
background: linear-gradient(color1, color2);

By default, gradients flow from top to bottom.
lessons.task: Füge einen Verlauf-Hintergrund von <kbd>coral</kbd> nach <kbd>gold</kbd> hinzu.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .card { padding: 2rem; border-radius: 12px; color: white; text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.5rem; } .card p { margin: 0; opacity: 0.9; }

lessons.title: Verlauf-Richtung
lessons.description:
Control the gradient direction by adding an angle or keyword before the colors.

Keywords: to right, to left, to bottom right
Angles: 45deg, 90deg, 180deg

background: linear-gradient(to right, blue, purple);
lessons.task: Lass den Verlauf von links nach rechts fließen mit <kbd>to right</kbd>.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2rem; } .btn { padding: 1rem 2rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: white; cursor: pointer; }

validations.message: Füge <kbd>to right</kbd> für die Richtung hinzu

lessons.title: Radialer Verlauf
lessons.description:
The radial-gradient() function creates a gradient that radiates from a center point outward in a circular or elliptical pattern.

background: radial-gradient(circle, white, steelblue);

Add circle for a perfect circular gradient.
lessons.task: Erstelle einen radialen Verlauf von <kbd>white</kbd> zu <kbd>steelblue</kbd>.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2rem; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .orb { width: 150px; height: 150px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(70, 130, 180, 0.4); }
